name: crio
explanation: CRI-O is a Kubernetes container runtime. The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheck and scrapes a single fixed Prometheus endpoint, defaulting to http://localhost:9090/metrics (the port CRI-O's `metrics_port` config option uses). No authentication is required — the metrics endpoint is plain HTTP on a known port. A generic OpenMetrics port-scan against the CRI-O metrics port satisfies discovery.
notes: Pattern A: OpenMetrics on a known port. No existing auto_conf.yaml; CRI-O typically runs on the host (not as a container), so AD-by-image is less natural — but the port/path are universal.
